channel.title: SeaVigil alerts
channel.description: New high-severity illegal-fishing leads: foreign or unauthorized vessels going dark or transshipping, from Global Fishing Watch events.

item.title: encounter: MLT in Italian Exclusive Economic Zone
item.description: DEGRE (MLT), foreign vessel, authorization lapsed. Authorization: authorization_lapsed. Event time 2026-06-26T03:10:00.000Z.
